title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Digital Products Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or any other country where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip is blocked, you're left with a frustrating choice: either abandon your online business or navigate a Byzantine landscape of payment processors and bank transfers. We've been helping creators like you sell digital products without these hurdles for years, and in this post, we'll break down the options and help you choose the best one for your situation.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, but each has its own set of requirements and restrictions. PayPal, for instance, has strict Know-Your-Customer (KYC) policies and geographical restrictions that block creators from certain countries. Stripe is more flexible, but still has its own set of rules and fees. Gumroad and Payhip are more geared towards creators who want to sell physical products, but can still be used for digital goods. However, each of these platforms has its own set of limitations and requirements that can make it difficult for creators to sell their products without getting blocked or charged excessive fees.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The biggest problem for creators in restricted countries is that these platforms often block them without explanation or warning. PayPal, for example, has been known to freeze accounts and withhold funds without providing any clear reasons. Stripe has a more flexible approach, but still requires creators to jump through hoops to get approved. Gumroad and Payhip have some restrictions, but are more lenient than PayPal. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive solution that includes a Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, all of which are designed to work together seamlessly and support creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, PayPal and Stripe are often the most expensive options. Gumroad and Payhip charge lower fees, but still have their own set of requirements and restrictions. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a flat fee of $79.99 that includes everything you need to set up and run your online store, including priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. This means you can sell your digital products without worrying about excessive fees or charges.
Don't let PayPal's restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products – choose Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle instead.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Another key factor to consider is automation and delivery capabilities. Gumroad and Payhip require manual delivery of digital products, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. PayPal and Stripe have automated delivery options, but these come with their own set of fees and restrictions. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides instant automated delivery of digital products, as well as real-time analytics and order management tools, making it easier to run your online store and focus on creating more content.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, Payhip, and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a simple and easy-to-use platform, Gumroad or Payhip might be a good choice. However, if you're looking for a more comprehensive solution that supports creators in restricted countries, provides instant automated delivery, and offers a flat fee of $79.99, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the way to go.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, no. Stripe has strict requirements and fees, and creators from these countries may find it difficult to get approved or may be charged excessive fees. However, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a more flexible and affordable solution that includes everything you need to set up and run your online store, including priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide.
Gumroad and Payhip may be popular, but they still have their own set of requirements and restrictions – go for a more flexible and affordable solution instead.
